ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the bill was introduced */,
  "bill_number" TEXT /* Number of the bill */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the bill */,
  "introduction_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was introduced */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bill */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bill (e.g., pending, passed, failed) */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the bill sponsor */,
  "sponsor_email" TEXT /* Email of the bill sponsor */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee responsible for the bill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_centers" (
  "voting_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting center */,
  "voting_center_name" TEXT /* Name of the voting center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the voting center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the voting center */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the voting center */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the voting center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., primary, general, special) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legislative_bodies" (
  "legislative_body_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislative body */,
  "legislative_body_name" TEXT /* Name of the legislative body */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the legislative body is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("legislative_body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bill_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "topic_description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bill_topics_bridge" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bill */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic */,
  "topic_relevance" TEXT /* Relevance of the topic to the bill (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id", "topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Name of the organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the bill */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the bill was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of access (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states_bills_bridge" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bill */,
  "bill_status" TEXT /* Status of the bill in the state (e.g., pending, passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id", "bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committee_members" (
  "committee_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee member */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the committee */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee member */,
  "member_email" TEXT /* Email of the committee member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_members_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "committee_description" TEXT /* Description of the committee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bill_versions" (
  "bill_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill version */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bill */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the bill */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the bill version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the bill version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_versions_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the state where the bill was introduced
Status of the bill (e.g., pending, passed, failed)
Name of the committee responsible for the bill
Unique identifier for each voting center
Phone number of the voting center
Email address of the voting center
Type of election (e.g., primary, general, special)
Unique identifier for each legislative body
Reference to the state where the legislative body is located
Relevance of the topic to the bill (e.g., primary, secondary)
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin)
Name of the organization the user belongs to
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the bill being accessed
ID of the user accessing the bill
Date when the bill was accessed
Status of the bill in the state (e.g., pending, passed, failed)
Unique identifier for each committee member
Unique identifier for each bill version
